title: ABB India Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: ABB India Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ABB India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ABB India Capital India:
ABB India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
